messages.text:
To create a backup, pick 'Create Project Backup'. It snapshots your project (excluding patterns from Settings).
Each backup gets a name and description. Add more files later with 'Add Files to Backup'.
Backups live in .backup\snapshots\ as full copies or compressed ZIPs.

To create a backup, pick 'Create Project Backup'. It snapshots your project (excluding patterns from Settings).
Each backup gets a name and description. Add more files later with 'Add Files to Backup'.
Backups live in .backup\snapshots\ as full copies or compressed ZIPs.
To delete a backup, pick 'Delete Backup'. This removes the snapshot from disk permanently.
